parameters.filterByFormula:
=AND(
  {Bed}!="",
  {Assignment Start Date}!="",
  {Assignment End Date}!="",
  FIND("Cancelled", ARRAYJOIN({Status (from Booking)}))=0,
  FIND("Expired", ARRAYJOIN({Status (from Booking)}))=0
)
